node.statement: EXACT M1 (Plateau values — topological): At filling nu=p/q, R_xy = h/(nu*e^2) = (h/e^2)*(q/p). This follows from gauge invariance + spectral gap (Laughlin's argument). Equivalently: sigma_xy = nu*e^2/h. NO APPROXIMATION — this is exact given the existence of a gap. [P11-Girvin eqs (1.2),(1.14); P01-Haldane p.607]
